title: Myeloid Progenitors in Single-cell AML
author: Cieslik, Marcin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In summary, this data is a high-dimensional single-cell RNA sequencing dataset from AML multiple samples, processed through normalization, batch effect correction (integration), dimensionality reduction, clustering, and cell type annotation steps. The goal is to identify and visualize distinct cell populations, including stem and progenitor cells, within and across samples.
steps_raw: In summary, this data is a high-dimensional single-cell RNA sequencing dataset from AML multiple samples, processed through normalization, batch effect correction (integration), dimensionality reduction, clustering, and cell type annotation steps. The goal is to identify and visualize distinct cell populations, including stem and progenitor cells, within and across samples.
